_comment: Curated seed of browser-runnable models. The freshness routine extends this from the HF API. status: built = has a models/<slug>/ page; pending = catalogued, page not built yet.

models.name: SmolVLM (vision-language)
models.blurb: Describe, answer questions about, and reason over an image with a tiny VLM.
models.unlocks: In-browser visual Q&A, alt-text, and screenshot understanding with zero server cost.

models.name: Whisper (speech-to-text)
models.blurb: Transcribe speech from the mic or a file, with word timestamps.
models.unlocks: Private, offline dictation, captions, and voice commands — audio never leaves the device.

models.name: Kokoro (text-to-speech)
models.blurb: High-quality speech synthesis with multiple voices, fully local.
models.unlocks: Natural narration and accessibility read-aloud with no API keys or per-character billing.

models.name: Qwen2.5 0.5B (chat LLM)
models.blurb: A small instruct LLM that streams tokens locally with sampling controls.
models.unlocks: Private chat, structured extraction, and on-device agents with no inference bill.

models.name: Llama 3.2 1B (WebLLM chat)
models.blurb: A capable 1B chat model running on MLC's WebGPU engine, fully local.
models.unlocks: Private ChatGPT-style assistants, on-device RAG, and offline agents with no server or API bill.

models.name: CLIP (zero-shot image)
models.blurb: Classify an image against ANY labels you type — no training.
models.unlocks: Custom, on-the-fly image moderation, tagging, and search with labels you invent at runtime.

models.name: Depth Anything v2 (monocular depth)
models.blurb: Turn any single photo into a depth map, live.
models.unlocks: 3D parallax, background blur, and AR occlusion from an ordinary 2D image.

models.name: RMBG-1.4 (background removal)
models.blurb: Cut the subject out of any photo, entirely in the browser.
models.unlocks: Instant private background removal for avatars, product shots, and stickers — no upload.

models.name: DETR (object detection)
models.blurb: Detect and box objects in an image or webcam feed.
models.unlocks: On-device counting, redaction, and scene understanding with no camera stream leaving the page.

models.name: SlimSAM (segment anything)
models.blurb: Click a point, get a precise mask of whatever you clicked.
models.unlocks: Interactive cut-out, smart selection, and annotation tools without a server round-trip.

models.name: all-MiniLM-L6 (text embeddings)
models.blurb: Turn text into vectors for semantic search and clustering.
models.unlocks: Private semantic search, dedup, and recommendation that runs in the tab with no vector DB.

models.name: DistilBERT SST-2 (sentiment)
models.blurb: Score text as positive/negative, with the token-level attributions.
models.unlocks: Live, private moderation and feedback triage as the user types — no PII leaves the device.

models.name: Florence-2 (vision foundation)
models.blurb: One model, many vision tasks: caption, detect, segment, OCR — via task prompts.
models.unlocks: A single tiny download that does captioning, grounding, OCR and region description on-device.
